title: Nostalgic School Graduation Group Photo AI
sourceTitle: Nostalgic School Graduation Group Photo AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Nostalgic 1990s Chinese school graduation group photo, staged inside an old classroom with authentic documentary-era atmosphere. Subject: 包含： - 木质课桌 - 黑板报 - 老吊扇 - 绿色窗框 - 粉笔字 - 蓝白校服 学生站位自然。 supplies the swappable subject detail for this template. A naturally arranged class group wears white shirts, navy pants, simple backpacks, with some classmates standing neatly and a few making playful expressions, all kept friendly, realistic, and group-photo believable. Scene: 包含： - 木质课桌 - 黑板报 - 老吊扇 - 绿色窗框 - 粉笔字 - 蓝白校服 学生站位自然。 provides the visible environment while the fixed composition and visual style remain intact. Old classroom setting with wooden desks, blackboard newspaper, chalk writing, old ceiling fan, green window frames, school wall details, and a lived-in graduation-day feeling. Composition: Fixed horizontal group-photo composition: rows of classmates arranged around desks and blackboard, central teacher-or-class-photo spacing, natural standing positions, balanced faces, and a believable class snapshot crop. Signature Elements: Old classroom, wooden desks, blackboard newspaper, ceiling fan, green windows, chalk writing, natural class formation, playful classmates, white shirts, navy pants, simple backpacks, and fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt. Fixed source details: Photo Texture: slightly faded film print with soft grain. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Faded warm photo tones, slightly yellowed print effect, muted classroom greens, worn wood browns, chalkboard darks, and restrained blue-white school-uniform accents or the supplied white shirts, navy pants, simple backpacks palette. Lighting: Soft ambient classroom daylight with mild old-camera exposure, gentle shadows, and authentic non-studio group-photo flatness. Camera: Slightly aged compact-camera viewpoint, front-facing class-photo framing, natural lens softness, and enough depth to keep desks, blackboard, and group readable. Materials: Wooden desks, chalk dust, blackboard texture, aged wall paint, green window frames, cloth uniforms or casual schoolwear, and fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
